rows.label: qev013802_MSG0001
rows.name: I work at a weapons corporation here in NLA, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0002
rows.name:
Fitting in with the customs of Earthlings 
is quite difficult, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0003
rows.name:
Everyone goes home when evening comes, 
even though for me, things only really start getting going after dark...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest that Arwe take part in Alex's seminar.

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, a person named Alex is holding it... 
If I participate in that, perhaps I can understand 
Earthlings much better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0005
rows.name:
Please let me participate. 
With this, it seems I'll be able to work smoothly from now on... 
Am I expecting too much?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0006
rows.name:
That is true... 
But I do not have the time to say such things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0007
rows.name:
It would be nice if someone held a meeting for Ma-non 
to teach us about Earthling customs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0008
rows.name: Because I am surely not the only one having trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0009
rows.name:
Alex's meeting. 
I am so looking forward to it now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013802_MSG0010
rows.name:
I will definitely learn the proper way 
to get along with Earthlings.[ST:wait ]
